ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-01-2013 Continued To Dec-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon provided an endorsed copy of a declaration from the Paralegal regarding her education and continuing education requirements of California Business & Professions Code 6450. Mr. Ferdon also provided a revised order showing fees paid to Attorney Shannon Hardin. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Continued To Oct-02-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shannon Hardin for Kenneth Valinoti. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA).

Mr. Ferdon informed the Court that the SFPA would exercise their authority and stated that Counsel's efforts would be compensated. The Court will appoint the San Francisco Public Administrator. Mr. Ferdon will submit the order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Brown.
